Present Simple

Form
Vbase / V-s / V-es
Clues
every day, on Mondays, from Monday to Friday, once / twice a week, twice a month, every summer / winter

★ Grammar Quest

Question 1 / 6

Choose the best answer. Only two options!

Mini Grammar Reminder
Present Simple Things we do often or many times: every day, on Mondays, from Monday to Friday, once / twice a week, twice a month, every summer / winter.
Present Progressive Things happening now: now, right now, today.
Think and choose
